title: Xerosicyos tripartitus

taxonomy: Xerosicyos tripartitus is a species of climbing cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is native to Madagascar and is known for its unique, tree-like growth habit. Xerosicyos tripartitus is classified within the subfamily Cactoideae, which includes a wide variety of cacti species. This species is a member of the genus Xerosicyos, which is a small group of climbing cacti. The classification of Xerosicyos tripartitus reflects its distinct characteristics and adaptations to its native environment.
